creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
installing lang/tcl85 and x11-toolkits/tk85 fails if options to install
	function's man pages are enabled.

Fix: here is a patch for lang/tcl85/Makefile and x11-toolkits/tk85/Makefile.
	i guess all tcl8x and tk8x has the same probably.
How-To-Repeat: 	always build with "WITH_TCL85_MAN=yes" (tcl85).
